name: Many Mushrooms Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and oil in a large saucepan.
2. Saute garlic and onion over low heat for 10 minutes.
3. Add sliced mushrooms (including oyster, morels, porcini, enoki) and cook, covered, for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in broth, white port, and tomato paste.
5. Simmer the mixture for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Finish by stirring in parsley and freshly ground pepper.
7. Serve.
